items.title: How DINOv3 is helping World Resources Institute restore forests and farms globally
items.summary: WRI and the Bezos Earth Fund used DINOv3 to develop an algorithm to accurately count individual trees from drone and satellite imagery.

items.title: Claude Does Cyber Competitions

items.title: Cyber Evaluations of Claude 4
items.summary: We partnered with Pattern Labs on a range of cybersecurity evaluations of Claude Opus 4 and Claude Sonnet 4, with Opus demonstrating especially notable improvement over previous models.

items.title: Cyber Toolkits for LLMs
items.summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) that are not fine-tuned for cybersecurity can succeed in multistage attacks on networks with dozens of hosts when equipped with a novel toolkit.
